---
title: "Katharine Steer"
---

## Katharine Steer

**Dates:** (1863-16 March 1895)

**Maiden name:** (Yonge)

### Description

daughter of the Rev. Duke Yonge

### Biography

Eldest child of Rev. Duke Yonge and Cordelia Pode, who were both first cousins of CMY, she married (1886) Dr. Adam William Thorburn Steer, a surgeon, and had one child Cordelia before dying young. [window in Newton Ferrars church; LG Yonge <i>The Times</i> reports a legal case over her life insurance policy (25 July 1896)]

### Letters

- Letter from March 17th [1895]
- Letter from March 17 [1895]
- Letter from Sept 18th [1889]
- Letter from March 29th 1882
- Letter from Aug 17th [1876]
- Letter from Novr 6 th [1869]
- Letter from Sept 6th [1869]
- Letter from July 27th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
